div.head: The Consul at Canton (Fletcher) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Father Henry J. Bush officially delivered by Marshall Chen Chi TangDirector of peace preservation at Canton. to this Consulate General 3 p.m. today. Bush in good health notwithstanding 7 weeks’ captivity and upon his request was placed on afternoon express train for Hong Kong accompanied by Father Charles P. Hilbert. Bush ascribes his release entirely to the strenuous efforts of the three first group army divisions mobilized by Marshal Chen Chi Tang for Bush’s rescue. Repeated to the Department, the Legation, Swatow and to Nanking.
